title: Tactical Masterclass #1
description: Master the fundamentals of team formation and spatial awareness on the pitch.

steps.instruction: Analyze the opponent's 4-3-3 formation for gaps.
Identify the weak link in the defensive line.
Exploit the half-spaces between fullbacks and center-backs.
Deliver the final killer pass into the box.

title: High-Pressure Pressing
description: Learn how to effectively press the opponent in their own half to force turnovers.

steps.instruction: Coordinate the front three to cut off passing lanes.
Close down the goalkeeper and central defenders quickly.
Force the opponent into making a hasty, inaccurate pass.
Intercept the ball and launch an immediate counter.

title: The Art of Counter-Attack
description: Exploit transitions from defense to attack with lightning speed and precision.

steps.instruction: Absorb the opponent's attack with a compact defensive block.
Regain possession and quickly find the target man.
Use overlapping runs to create numerical advantages.
Finish clinicaly with a low cross or direct shot.

title: Midfield Dominance
description: Control the tempo of the game through superior midfield positioning and passing.

steps.instruction: Occupy the central zones to limit opponent distribution.
Execute quick triangular passes to bypass pressure.
Find the Creative Midfielder in the 'Pocket' of space.
Switch the play to the wide areas to stretch the defense.

title: Set Piece Specialist
description: Maximize scoring opportunities from corners and free kicks with strategic movement.

steps.instruction: Position the tallest players for a near-post flick-on.
Create confusion with decoy runs through the box.
Deliver an accurate inswinging cross into the danger zone.
Execute a powerful header directed at the far corner.

title: Zonal Defending
description: Defend as a unit, covering specific areas rather than individual opponents.

steps.instruction: Maintain horizontal and vertical compactness.
Shift the entire block according to the ball's position.
Provide cover for the pressing teammate.
Anticipate the cross and clear the ball from the danger zone.

title: The False Nine Role
description: Learn to play with a deep-lying forward who creates space for wingers to cut inside.

steps.instruction: Drop deep into the midfield to pull center-backs out of position.
Receive the ball with back to goal and lay it off.
Watch for wingers making diagonal runs into the vacant space.
Play a through ball to release the sprinting winger.

title: Goalkeeper Distribution
description: Modern goalkeepers are the first line of attack. Master quick distribution.

steps.instruction: Immediately look for wingers after making a save.
Determine if a long throw or short pass is better.
Execute an accurate side-volley to bypass the midfield press.
Communicate with the defenders to reset the formation.
